tiebreaker: Most total resources + food remaining, then most farm level + tool level

categories.label: Building VP
categories.description: VP scored from building tiles during the game

categories.label: Civilization Card Immediate VP
categories.description: VP scored from civilization card immediate bonuses

categories.label: Tool Multiplier Cards
categories.description: VP = tool level x number of tool-multiplier cards

categories.label: Farm Multiplier Cards
categories.description: VP = farm level x number of farm-multiplier cards

categories.label: Building Multiplier Cards
categories.description: VP = number of buildings x number of building-multiplier cards

categories.label: Worker Multiplier Cards
categories.description: VP = number of workers x number of worker-multiplier cards

categories.label: Unique Civilization Card Sets
categories.description: VP = n-squared for n unique background patterns collected

categories.label: Remaining Resources & Food
categories.description: 1 VP per remaining resource (wood, clay, stone, gold) and food

categories.label: Starvation Penalty
categories.description: -10 VP each time you could not feed all workers
